text:
match args.mode() {
    Mode::Search(_) if !args.matches_possible() => false,
    Mode::Search(mode) if args.threads() == 1 => search(&args, mode)?,
    Mode::Search(mode) => search_parallel(&args, mode)?,
    Mode::Files if args.threads() == 1 => files(&args)?,
    Mode::Files => files_parallel(&args)?,
    Mode::Types => return types(&args),
    Mode::Generate(mode) => return generate(mode),
}

match self {
    TopEntryPoint::SourceFile => grammar::entry::top::source_file,
    TopEntryPoint::MacroStmts => grammar::entry::top::macro_stmts,
    TopEntryPoint::MacroItems => grammar::entry::top::macro_items,
    TopEntryPoint::Pattern => grammar::entry::top::pattern,
    TopEntryPoint::Type => grammar::entry::top::type_,
    TopEntryPoint::Expr => grammar::entry::top::expr,
    TopEntryPoint::MetaItem => grammar::entry::top::meta_item,
}

match attributes {
    Some(applicable) => applicable
        .iter()
        .flat_map(|name| ATTRIBUTES.binary_search_by_key(name, |attr| attr.key()).ok())
        .flat_map(|idx| ATTRIBUTES.get(idx))
        .for_each(add_completion),
    None if is_inner => ATTRIBUTES.iter().for_each(add_completion),
    None => ATTRIBUTES.iter().filter(|compl| !compl.prefer_inner).for_each(add_completion),
}
